lastReleaseMessage: 20-improvement sweep: fix stale print-path and setState comments; drop the dead section-focus listener; save indicator flashes and announces only on real saves; orientation repaint dedupe; safe boot-failure screen; fonts-ready autofit skips detached nodes; patchNested creates missing path objects; lazy-load html2canvas with an SRI pin on first export; add favicon, canonical, OG meta, noscript; shortcut dialog backdrop dismiss; aria-labels on saved-label actions; new test-data-integrity.mjs plus a node-import guard that un-breaks test-render.mjs; real v1.0.2 changelog bullets; README runtime-dep and tests sections; delete script .bak leftovers

barRaise.topFinding: The printed label does not match the preview. src/render.js:581 runs autofit only over mounts.preview, and .lbl-herb declares no font-size anywhere in styles/ (label.css:299-305), so the herb name gets its fitted size from an inline style the parallel #print-stage tree never receives. Print is the product's purpose, and any name long enough for the preview to shrink prints at the inherited default inside a white-space:nowrap card. Separately, src/util/export-png.js defines a complete exportPng() that nothing imports or calls, while PROJECT_SPEC.md:347 and README.md:13 claim PNG export ships in v1.0. Two of the three v1.0 output promises are not true. No BLOCK: all four hard rules hold, three version pills agree at v1.0.3, and no secret is committed. Health 78 across 30 lenses; the drop from 94 is mostly coverage (15 lenses last run, 30 this run, eight orchestration lenses scoring 60-78 for the first time), not a week of decay.

actions.title: Run autofit over the print-stage subtree so the printed herb name matches the preview (render.js:581 only fits mounts.preview; .lbl-herb has no font-size in CSS)
Fix the "Lynn's Apothocary" misspelling in index.html:50 and src/state.js:131
Wire an Export PNG control, or strip the PNG-export claims from PROJECT_SPEC.md:343,347 and README.md:13; exportPng has zero callers
Add a fatal node test-data-integrity/test-render/test-migration preflight to release.ps1; nothing runs the suite and there is no CI
Add data/illustrations/SOURCES.md for the 75 botanical PNGs and reconcile PROJECT_SPEC.md:109's public-domain claim against the recorded SpiceJungle scrape
Export migrateLayoutFrom and helpers so test-migration.mjs imports the shipped migration instead of its own copy
Assert runes.length === 3 in test-data-integrity.mjs and length-guard the loop at src/ui/editor.js:523-525
Fix scripts/release.ps1:139 so the CHANGELOG stub stops echoing $Message into both heading and bullet, then rewrite the v1.0.3 entry
Make defaultLayout() derive zones from the template descriptor and add a templateId setter, so a second template is a registry-only add
Route release.ps1's index.html, PROJECT_SPEC.md, and CHANGELOG.md writes through the tmp+rename+readback+retry pattern from write-dashboard-status.ps1:208-230
Re-run write-dashboard-status.ps1 between releases; Apothecary.json claims workTreeClean:true while the tree has been dirty since 2026-07-07 and its audit pointer names the 2026-07-03 report
git rm --cached outputs/sonnet-ingredient-gathering-prompt.md and gitignore outputs/; it names Sonnet and Claude and is published to the public repo
Build texture picker tiles lazily and serve downscaled thumbnails; editor.js:412-421 attaches 16.6 MB of full-res JPGs at mount and collapsed sections use max-height:0, not display:none
Route entry.state through the boot migration in src/ui/saved-labels-ui.js:79-80; a pre-v0.9 saved label has no state.layout and loads blank
Add a not-medical-advice disclaimer to the app footer; render.js:296 prints compounds and cautions onto physical labels
Delete the blind Remove-Item .git/index.lock blocks in push-to-github.ps1, push-yae-mirror.ps1, and deploy-to-yae.ps1 and let Assert-GitSafe be the only lock handler

tensionsOpen.note: Root cause found this run: adr-promoter is invoked by nothing, so the promote-via-adr-promoter escape hatch every run reaches for does not exist. Make the cadence call directly or wire the skill.
Shrinking the 4.9 MB parchment sources fixes cold load but costs print DPI. Keep hi-res for the render, ship thumbnails for the picker.
A medicinal disclaimer on the printed label clutters the artifact. Put it in the app footer instead.
Untracking CLAUDE.md hides the handler from anyone cloning. Untrack the obvious scratch now; treat CLAUDE.md as a deliberate call.
drift-auto-fix applies edits nothing may ship, so PROJECT_SPEC.md:76 has been uncommitted 3 days and every nightly audit re-detects it.
